list.name: Changes
list.comment: Reorganized the project structure by moving the Rust backend to a `src-server` directory and prefixing API routes. And initialized a React.js project.

task.summary: Added `/profile` route to display user account info and currently playing media.
Added the `kiroku-packager` binary and infrastructure for media metadata extraction and HLS packaging.

Refactored `Packager` to use granular transcoding methods and improved the CLI workflow.
- Split the monolithic `encode` method into `transcode_video`, `transcode_audio`, and `extract_subtitles`. - Implemented video transcoding progress tracking by piping `ffmpeg` output. - Added a `OnceLock` to `Packager` to cache `MediaMetadata`. - Updated the CLI to manage the full transcode-and-package lifecycle, including temporary file cleanup. - Introduced `env_logger` for structured logging and added specific `TranscodeError` and `PackagerError` types. - Fixed duration calculation in metadata extraction.

Refactored `Packager` to use granular transcoding methods and improved the CLI workflow.
- Split the monolithic `encode` method into `transcode_video`, `transcode_audio`, and `extract_subtitles`. - Implemented video transcoding progress tracking by piping `ffmpeg` output. - Added a `OnceLock` to `Packager` to cache `MediaMetadata`. - Updated the CLI to manage the full transcode-and-package lifecycle, including temporary file cleanup. - Introduced `env_logger` for structured logging and added specific `TranscodeError` and `PackagerError` types. - Fixed duration calculation in metadata extraction.

Implemented a background media processing service for transcoding and packaging.
- Introduced `PackagerService` to manage an asynchronous pipeline for transcoding video (720p, 1080p), extracting audio/subtitles, and HLS packaging. - Implemented `MediaProcessorRepository` to persist media metadata and track processing status in SQLite. - Added a `/enqueue` POST endpoint to trigger the processing pipeline for specific media files. - Updated the `Packager` utility to improve `ffmpeg` error handling, capture stdout progress, and return the final master playlist path. - Enhanced the database migration runner to support multiple SQL statements per migration file. - Expanded the database schema (Migration v3) to include tables for `metadata`, `chapters`, `streams`, and `processing_queue`. - Added `uuid` and `directories` dependencies to manage unique processing identifiers and project data paths.

Implemented a background media processing service for transcoding and packaging.
- Introduced `PackagerService` to manage an asynchronous pipeline for transcoding video (720p, 1080p), extracting audio/subtitles, and HLS packaging. - Implemented `MediaProcessorRepository` to persist media metadata and track processing status in SQLite. - Added a `/enqueue` POST endpoint to trigger the processing pipeline for specific media files. - Updated the `Packager` utility to improve `ffmpeg` error handling, capture stdout progress, and return the final master playlist path. - Enhanced the database migration runner to support multiple SQL statements per migration file. - Expanded the database schema (Migration v3) to include tables for `metadata`, `chapters`, `streams`, and `processing_queue`. - Added `uuid` and `directories` dependencies to manage unique processing identifiers and project data paths.
Reorganized the project structure by moving the Rust backend to a `src-server` directory and prefixing API routes. And initialized a React.js project.
Reorganized the project structure by moving the Rust backend to a `src-server` directory and prefixing API routes. And initialized a React.js project.

MESSAGE.value: Added `/profile` route to display user account info and currently playing media.
Added the `kiroku-packager` binary and infrastructure for media metadata extraction and HLS packaging.

Refactored `Packager` to use granular transcoding methods and improved the CLI workflow.
- Split the monolithic `encode` method into `transcode_video`, `transcode_audio`, and `extract_subtitles`. - Implemented video transcoding progress tracking by piping `ffmpeg` output. - Added a `OnceLock` to `Packager` to cache `MediaMetadata`. - Updated the CLI to manage the full transcode-and-package lifecycle, including temporary file cleanup. - Introduced `env_logger` for structured logging and added specific `TranscodeError` and `PackagerError` types. - Fixed duration calculation in metadata extraction.

Implemented a background media processing service for transcoding and packaging.
- Introduced `PackagerService` to manage an asynchronous pipeline for transcoding video (720p, 1080p), extracting audio/subtitles, and HLS packaging. - Implemented `MediaProcessorRepository` to persist media metadata and track processing status in SQLite. - Added a `/enqueue` POST endpoint to trigger the processing pipeline for specific media files. - Updated the `Packager` utility to improve `ffmpeg` error handling, capture stdout progress, and return the final master playlist path. - Enhanced the database migration runner to support multiple SQL statements per migration file. - Expanded the database schema (Migration v3) to include tables for `metadata`, `chapters`, `streams`, and `processing_queue`. - Added `uuid` and `directories` dependencies to manage unique processing identifiers and project data paths.
Reorganized the project structure by moving the Rust backend to a `src-server` directory and prefixing API routes. And initialized a React.js project.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Reorganized the project structure by moving the Rust backend to a `src-server` directory and prefixing API routes. And initialized a React.js project.
